subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Today the Tongue of God speaketh in all things, yet none is found possessed of hearing that he might comprehend [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای علی الیوم لسان الله در کلشی ناطق ولکن ذی سمعی مشهود نه تا ادراک نماید و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @divine attributes are within all things; every atom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
